parameters.content:
## [Reviews] Handle Rating Click v1.0.0

Public webhook — no header auth (link is clicked from email). Security is the HMAC-signed token.

**Params:** ?t={token}&p={payload_b64}&r=good|bad

**Flow:**
1. Parse & decode params → get client_slug, source_type, source_ref from payload
2. Get client config → verify token against stored link_signing_secret
3. Invalid token → 410 expired page
4. r=good → 302 redirect to google_review_link
5. r=bad → mark Needs Followup in sheet → email review_notify_email → show sorry page

This workflow is unaffected by future CRM trigger adapters — source_type/source_ref in the token payload handle write-back routing.

parameters.responseBody: {"error": "This feature is not enabled for your account."}

This link has expired

Your review link is no longer valid (links expire after 30 days).

If you'd like to share feedback, please contact the business directly.

Thank you for your feedback

We're sorry to hear your experience wasn't perfect.

We've notified the team and someone will be in touch with you soon.

meta.changes: migration 3 — Check Reviews Feature converted from Postgres to Code node (Postgres returned only {enabled}, stripping action/token/secret before Verify Review Token; Code node spreads full incoming data + adds enabled)
